hero.title: Elegant Hair Salon
hero.subtitle: Where beauty meets elegance
hero.slogan: Discover your perfect style with our expert stylists

about.title: About Us
about.short: Welcome to Elegant Hair Salon, where passion for hairstyling meets exceptional service. With over 15 years of experience, our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to making you look and feel your best.
about.story: Founded in 2010, Elegant Hair Salon started as a small studio with a big dream. Over the years, we have grown into one of the most beloved salons in the city, known for our attention to detail, creative styles, and personalized approach. Every client who walks through our doors leaves feeling beautiful and confident.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Premium hair care tailored to you
services.womenHaircutDesc: Precision cut tailored to your face shape and style preferences
services.menHaircutDesc: Classic and modern cuts with precise detailing
services.kidsHaircutDesc: Gentle and fun haircuts for children of all ages
services.basicColoringDesc: Full coverage color for a fresh, vibrant look
services.balayageDesc: Hand-painted highlights for a natural, sun-kissed effect
services.ombreDesc: Gradual color transition from dark to light
services.highlightsDesc: Strategic highlights to add dimension and brightness
services.blowoutDesc: Professional blow-dry for smooth, voluminous hair
services.updoDesc: Elegant updos for weddings, proms, and special events
services.smoothingDesc: Professional keratin treatment for silky, frizz-free hair
services.deepConditionDesc: Intensive moisture treatment for dry or damaged hair
services.hotTowelsDesc: Traditional hot towel shave for a smooth finish

reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.review1: Absolutely love this salon! The stylists are incredibly talented and the atmosphere is so relaxing. I always leave feeling like a million bucks.
reviews.review2: Best haircut I've ever had. The attention to detail is remarkable. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a premium salon experience.
reviews.review3: I've been coming here for years and I wouldn't trust anyone else with my hair. The coloring is always perfect and the team is wonderful.

team.title: Meet Our Stylists
team.member1Desc: With over 15 years of experience, Marija specializes in precision cuts and creative coloring.
team.member2Desc: Jelena is an expert in balayage and fashion colors, certified by L'Oréal Professionnel.
team.member3Desc: Ana brings creativity and passion to every hairstyle, specializing in bridal and event styling.
team.member4Desc: Nikola is a master barber with expertise in classic and modern men's grooming.
